meta.title: Demand pressure scenarios for RES-E catch-up burden
meta.purpose: Estimate how additional electricity demand from data centres and EVs widens the renewable electricity build burden required to maintain the 2030 RES-E target share.
meta.important_note: These scenarios do not change the official 80% RES-E target. They estimate additional renewable electricity required if electricity demand rises.

low.label: Constrained / plateau
low.description: Data-centre demand reaches the known 2025 forecast and then plateaus.

central.label: Managed growth
central.description: Data-centre demand grows moderately after the 2025 forecast.

high.label: AI / high-growth pressure
high.description: Data-centre demand continues to expand rapidly after the 2025 forecast.

low.label: Slow uptake
low.description: EV electricity demand grows slowly toward 2030.

central.label: Policy-aligned uptake
central.description: EV electricity demand grows steadily toward 2030.

high.label: Accelerated electrification
high.description: EV electricity demand grows rapidly toward 2030.
